origin.subject: NDVI time series for Pine Ridge Oglala Lakota Nation
origin.source_name: MODIS MOD13Q1 V061 via ORNL DAAC MODIS Web Service
origin.label_authority: Tribal Data Governance Office, Oglala Lakota Nation
origin.license: NASA data use policy: open for non-commercial research
origin.access_conditions: TK Non-Commercial label applies. Results must be shared with the Tribal Data Governance Office before publication.

chain.process: Data ingested from ORNL DAAC MODIS Web Service
inputs: ORNL DAAC API response (MOD13Q1, lat=43.35, lon=-102.09, 2000-2023)
chain.notes: 16-day composites, ±2km pixel average. Year-by-year queries (10-tile limit).

chain.process: Anomaly: annual GS NDVI minus long-term mean
